issues.sample: This is the same issue with the 2023 Electrified G80 Sedan and other Hyundai Group electric vehicles.  When using the car in "i-Pedal" (one-pedal driving) mode — the highest brake regen setting — the car can come to a complete stop whenever I lift my foot off the accelerator peda

narrative.headline: What 2024 Genesis Electrified G80 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (50% of reports).
